Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet 
WHERE comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND baseline."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = upgrade."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND baseline.state = upgrade.state 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND (upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (upgrade."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR baseline."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (upgrade."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR baseline."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) AND (upgrade."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL OR baseline."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/f4c626b98b8c4126782b3296346819aeb31ab958051a5629a789c4cc4558dfe0/7a83a036-0720-4243-bd70-7d3262ae7b35/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
